summary: Detailed implementation plan for building a fully offline, self-contained PDF editor application in c:\Users\admin\Documents\pdfeditfd. The app uses PyMuPDF, OpenCV, Tesseract OCR with a CustomTkinter GUI. Key features include: page splitting by Y-coordinate or after OCR-detected text, merge/split/rotate/crop pages, add text/images/watermarks, annotations/highlights, encrypt/decrypt, compress, extract text/images, and more. Everything runs in a local Python venv with Tesseract OCR bundled in the project directory.
